commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Mattermost draft-preview boundary splitting for block mode, Mattermost-specific streaming/toolPreview config handling, raw tool-argument preview rendering, docs/changelog updates, generated metadata, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a high-confidence source reproduction: Mattermost updates one draft preview post for thinking, partial reply, and tool phases, and the local reset API is not called at turn boundaries.
